features.name: Project Review Entrypoint
features.description: Establish README and docs navigation as a future-review map for the harness learning project.
features.evidence: 2026-06-13: Commit ba1544b added README.md, docs/index.md, and docs/evolution/index.md as the initial review entrypoint.

features.name: Harness Lifecycle Scaffold
features.description: Adapt the harness-creator lifecycle artifacts to this repo without overwriting the existing AGENTS.md contract.
features.evidence: 2026-06-13: Added project-specific feature_list.json, progress.md, session-handoff.md, init.sh, AGENTS.md lifecycle pointers, and docs/evolution/0001-harness-lifecycle-bootstrap.md. ./init.sh passed. harness-creator validate-harness returned 100/100.

features.name: Project Context Restoration
features.description: Fill CONTEXT.md with the durable project purpose, boundaries, terminology, and restart assumptions for future sessions.
features.evidence: 2026-06-27: Expanded CONTEXT.md with mission, scope, canonical five-subsystem model, product direction, evidence model, repository contract, and restart assumptions. Reconciled the harness-creator taxonomy in docs/learning-harness-summary.md and verified with ./init.sh.

features.name: Evolution Record Backfill
features.description: Backfill the first concrete docs/evolution stage record for the README and lifecycle bootstrap work.
features.evidence: 2026-06-13: Added docs/evolution/0001-harness-lifecycle-bootstrap.md with goal, starting state, method, decisions, evidence, reusable conclusions, open questions, and next step.

features.name: Template Boundary Review
features.description: Decide which lifecycle artifacts belong in templates/ and which remain project-specific to this learning repo.
features.evidence: 2026-06-27: Published docs/workflows/harness-product-boundaries.md and ADR 0002 for the contract-first shared core, classified reusable versus project-owned assets, and verified the repository with ./init.sh.

features.name: Agent Operating Contract Slimming
features.description: Reduce AGENTS.md to a short root operating contract and move long OMX/generated reference material into docs.
features.evidence: 2026-06-13: Slimmed AGENTS.md from 249 lines to 111 lines, moved OMX reference material to docs/workflows/omx-runtime.md, added docs/adr/0001-keep-agents-md-as-root-operating-contract.md, updated CONTEXT.md terminology, and verified with ./init.sh plus harness-creator validate-harness 100/100.

features.name: Learning Harness Summary Compression
features.description: Compress the long learning-harness research note into a concise five-subsystem methodology and execution lifecycle.
features.evidence: 2026-06-27: Rewrote docs/learning-harness-summary.md from 1063 to 318 lines with seven numbered sections, one five-subsystem model, one execution lifecycle, repository mapping, and successful structural validation plus ./init.sh.

features.name: Shared Harness Contract Core
features.description: Implement canonical schemas, capability rules, deterministic readiness inspection, and fixture contract tests.
features.evidence: 2026-06-27: Shared-core design accepted and recorded in docs/superpowers/specs/2026-06-27-shared-harness-core-design.md; implementation remains pending.

features.name: Harness Doctor Skill
features.description: Build the read-only doctor entrypoint over the shared core with canonical JSON and human-readable reports.

features.name: Harness Creator Skill
features.description: Build the non-destructive creator entrypoint with conditional context restoration and check-first initialization.

features.name: Harness Product Integration
features.description: Validate creator-to-doctor workflows across supported fixtures and non-standard project shapes.

features.name: Harness Field Validation
features.description: Run representative before-and-after coding-agent tasks and evaluate effectiveness without conflating it with readiness.
